basic_details.job_title: Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 65 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The High Court of Gujarat, Sola, Ahmedabad has released a recruitment notification for the post of Legal Assistant on a contractual basis in 2026. This is an excellent opportunity for law graduates to work with one of the prestigious High Courts in India. A total of 65 vacancies have been announced under this recruitment drive.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 01 July 2026 (12:00 Hrs) Last Date for Apply Online: 20 July 2026 (23:59 Hrs)

how_to_apply: Visit the official Gujarat High Court website
Go to the recruitment section (OJAS portal)
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
Submit and take a printout for reference

faq.question: Q1. What is Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by the High Court of Gujarat to fill Legal Assistant posts on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 65 vacancies have been announced for Legal Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the starting date to apply online?
faq.answer: The online application starts from 01 July 2026 (12:00 Hrs).

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 20 July 2026 (23:59 Hrs).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed remuneration of ₹60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type of this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job initially for 11 months, extendable up to another 11 months.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required qualification?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Law Degree (LLB) from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Legal Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process generally includes written test, interview, and document verification.
